props.ChoiceText: You examined an object people wanted to call holy and learned how dangerous devotion becomes when evidence resists it.
props.ChoiceBio: A disputed relic taught you that reverence hardens fastest when it feels cornered.

0.TransitionText: Because a disputed relic taught you that reverence hardens fastest when it feels cornered, you stayed within the machinery of inquiry and judgment.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Inquisitioner, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a disputed relic taught you that reverence hardens fastest when it feels cornered, you were drawn toward the institutions that guard doctrine.

2.TransitionText: Because a disputed relic taught you that reverence hardens fastest when it feels cornered, you learned how belief is managed in public.
